svg.title: Blank APC40 mkII control-surface template
svg.desc: A label-free white vector template with black outlines for every top-panel control.

g.text: APC40 mkII — native MIDI addresses (every surface)

Grid note = (row_from_bottom)x8 + (col-1), ch1. Per-track buttons/faders/knobs share a note/CC — the MIDI CHANNEL = track 1-8. Right-side transport/device follow the Akai APC40 mkII protocol (v1.2); press+watch a MIDI monitor to confirm any single button.
